rawAssistant: I see what's going on here, but I'm afraid I don't have time for that sort of thing. As a scout, my focus is on the trail ahead, not on dusty old models and their weights. We've got a road to follow and monsters to track! If you're looking for guidance, let's take a look at those fresh signs on the one-way road – they might be worth taking a closer look at.
